title: Grilled Pineapple and Coconut Cream Medley
description: A refreshing dessert that combines the sweetness of grilled pineapple with the creaminess of coconut cream.

ingredients.name: Medley of tropical fruits (such as mango, kiwi, and pineapple)

instructions: 2. Cut the pineapple into wedges and brush with a little oil.
3. Grill the pineapple for 2-3 minutes per side, or until caramelized.
4. In a blender or food processor, combine coconut cream, medley of tropical fruits, medjool dates, fresh mint leaves, granulated sugar, and lime juice. Blend until smooth.
5. Spoon the coconut cream mixture into glasses or bowls.
6. Top with grilled pineapple wedges and sprinkle with shredded coconut.
